```json
{
  "requirements": {
    "functionality": [
      "Provide a Wishbone slave interface for configuration registers and BD access.",
      "Provide a Wishbone master interface for DMA transfers to/from external memory.",
      "Implement SD/MMC command and data path with CRC, interrupt, and status handling.",
      "Support buffer descriptor (BD) management for Tx and Rx.",
      "Provide dual‑clock FIFOs for Tx and Rx data transfer.",
      "Provide a clock divider for SD card clock generation.",
      "Support optional SD_CLK_SEP and SDC_IRQ_ENABLE configurations."
    ],
    "performance_target": {
      "wishbone_burst_length": 4,
      "max_dma_transfer_rate": ">= 50 MB/s (depends on system clock)",
      "command_latency": "< 10 µs from write to cmd_out",
      "interrupt_latency": "< 5 µs"
    },
    "io_interface": {
      "wishbone_slave": {
        "clk": "wb_clk_i",
        "rst": "wb_rst_i",
        "dat_i": "wb_dat_i",
        "dat_o": "wb_dat_o",
        "adr_i": "wb_adr_i",
        "sel_i": "wb_sel_i",
        "we_i": "wb_we_i",
        "cyc_i": "wb_cyc_i",
        "stb_i": "wb_stb_i",

      },

        "cmd_oe_o": "sd_cmd_oe_o",
        "dat_dat_i": "sd_dat_dat_i",
        "dat_out_o": "sd_dat_out_o",
        "dat_oe_o": "sd_dat_oe_o",
        "clk_o_pad": "sd_clk_o_pad",
        "clk_i_pad": "sd_clk_i_pad",

      },

        "int_b_ext": "int_b",
        "int_c_ext": "int_c"
      }
    },
    "ppa_constraints": {
      "area": "< 200 kGE",
      "power": "< 1 W (dynamic)",
      "timing": "setup/hold < 200 ps, max clock 200 MHz"
    }
  },
  "modules": [
    {
      "name": "sdc_controller",
      "type": "top",
      "submodules": [
        "sd_controller_wb",
        "sd_cmd_master",
        "sd_data_master",
        "sd_cmd_serial_host",
        "sd_data_serial_host",
        "sd_bd_tx",
        "sd_bd_rx",
        "sd_fifo_tx_filler",
        "sd_fifo_rx_filler",
        "sd_clock_divider",
        "sd_crc_16",
        "sd_crc_7"
      ],
      "needs_decomposition": true,
      "sub_spec": "Top‑level module that wires all sub‑blocks together, handles clock domain crossing, and implements the optional SD_CLK_SEP and SDC_IRQ_ENABLE logic."
    },
    {
      "name": "sd_controller_wb",
      "type": "wishbone_slave",
      "needs_decomposition": false,
      "sub_spec": "Registers, BD write enable logic, interrupt status, and command interface signals."
    },
    {
      "name": "sd_cmd_master",
      "type": "command_logic",
      "needs_decomposition": false,
      "sub_spec": "FSM for command sequencing, CRC/Index checking, and status register updates."
    },
    {
      "name": "sd_data_master",
      "type": "data_path",
      "needs_decomposition": false,
      "sub_spec": "FSM for BD handling, DMA initiation, FIFO status monitoring, and interrupt generation."
    },
    {
      "name": "sd_cmd_serial_host",
      "type": "serial_interface",
      "needs_decomposition": false,
      "sub_spec": "Physical command line driver with start/stop bits, CRC, and status reporting."
    },
    {
      "name": "sd_data_serial_host",
      "type": "serial_interface",
      "needs_decomposition": false,
      "sub_spec": "Bidirectional data bus driver with CRC‑16, start/stop bits, and busy signalling."
    },
    {
      "name": "sd_bd_tx",
      "type": "bd",
      "needs_decomposition": false,
      "sub_spec": "Circular buffer of Tx BDs, write/read pointers, free counter."
    },
    {
      "name": "sd_bd_rx",
      "type": "bd",
      "needs_decomposition": false,
      "sub_spec": "Circular buffer of Rx BDs, write/read pointers, free counter."
    },
    {
      "name": "sd_fifo_tx_filler",
      "type": "fifo",
      "needs_decomposition": false,
      "sub_spec": "Dual‑clock FIFO for Tx data, Wishbone master interface for DMA."
    },
    {
      "name": "sd_fifo_rx_filler",
      "type": "fifo",
      "needs_decomposition": false,
      "sub_spec": "Dual‑clock FIFO for Rx data, Wishbone master interface for DMA."
    },
    {
      "name": "sd_clock_divider",
      "type": "clock_divider",
      "needs_decomposition": false,
      "sub_spec": "8‑bit programmable divider, asynchronous reset."
    },
    {
      "name": "sd_crc_16",
      "type": "crc",
      "needs_decomposition": false,
      "sub_spec": "16‑bit LFSR CRC generator for data path."
    },
    {
      "name": "sd_crc_7",
      "type": "crc",
      "needs_decomposition": false,
      "sub_spec": "7‑bit LFSR CRC generator for command path."
    }
  ],

      "Assert that BD free counter never underflows.",
      "Assert that CRC outputs match expected values for known patterns."

      "BD write/read sequences.",
      "Command FSM state coverage.",

  "unresolved_assumptions": [
    "The SD card interface timing (setup/hold) is compatible with the chosen sd_clk frequency.",
    "The SD_BUS_W is fixed to 4 bits; no support for 1‑bit mode is implemented.",
    "The Wishbone master burst type (CTI/BTE) is always 0 (single transfer).",
    "The asynchronous reset of sd_clock_divider is active‑high and does not require a synchronous de‑assertion.",
    "The BD_SIZE is a power of two (<= 256) to simplify pointer wrap‑around logic.",
    "The external SD card model used in simulation correctly implements the SD protocol timing and CRC checks."
  ]

```

functionality: Provide a Wishbone slave interface for configuration registers and BD access.
Provide a Wishbone master interface for DMA transfers to/from external memory.
Implement SD/MMC command and data path with CRC, interrupt, and status handling.
Support buffer descriptor (BD) management for Tx and Rx.
Provide dual‑clock FIFOs for Tx and Rx data transfer.
Provide a clock divider for SD card clock generation.
Support optional SD_CLK_SEP and SDC_IRQ_ENABLE configurations.

modules.name: sdc_controller
modules.sub_spec: Top‑level module that wires all sub‑blocks together, handles clock domain crossing, and implements the optional SD_CLK_SEP and SDC_IRQ_ENABLE logic.

modules.name: sd_controller_wb
modules.sub_spec: Registers, BD write enable logic, interrupt status, and command interface signals.

modules.name: sd_cmd_master
modules.sub_spec: FSM for command sequencing, CRC/Index checking, and status register updates.

modules.name: sd_data_master
modules.sub_spec: FSM for BD handling, DMA initiation, FIFO status monitoring, and interrupt generation.

modules.name: sd_cmd_serial_host
modules.sub_spec: Physical command line driver with start/stop bits, CRC, and status reporting.

modules.name: sd_data_serial_host
modules.sub_spec: Bidirectional data bus driver with CRC‑16, start/stop bits, and busy signalling.

modules.name: sd_bd_tx
modules.sub_spec: Circular buffer of Tx BDs, write/read pointers, free counter.

modules.name: sd_bd_rx
modules.sub_spec: Circular buffer of Rx BDs, write/read pointers, free counter.

modules.name: sd_fifo_tx_filler
modules.sub_spec: Dual‑clock FIFO for Tx data, Wishbone master interface for DMA.

modules.name: sd_fifo_rx_filler
modules.sub_spec: Dual‑clock FIFO for Rx data, Wishbone master interface for DMA.

modules.name: sd_crc_16
modules.sub_spec: 16‑bit LFSR CRC generator for data path.

modules.name: sd_crc_7
modules.sub_spec: 7‑bit LFSR CRC generator for command path.

reuse_decisions.notes: All register addresses and widths match the spec; only BD write enable logic is added.
FIFO depth is parameterized to support FIFO_TX_MEM_DEPTH from sd_defines.v.
Same depth as Tx FIFO; only read/write enable logic differs.
8‑bit divider value matches spec; asynchronous reset is supported.
Direct mapping of the spec; no parameterization needed.
Direct mapping of the spec; no parameterization needed.
No existing IP matches the BD circular buffer with 16‑bit width and dual‑write support; new RTL required.
Same as Tx BD; new RTL required.
Complex FSM with CRC/Index checking; new RTL required.
Complex FSM for BD handling and DMA; new RTL required.
Physical command line driver; new RTL required.
Bidirectional data bus driver with CRC‑16; new RTL required.

clock_domains.name: system_clk
clock_domains.description: Primary clock for Wishbone, BD logic, and FIFO control.

clock_domains.name: sd_clk
clock_domains.description: Clock driving the SD command and data physical interfaces.

simulation: Create a top‑level testbench that instantiates sdc_controller.
Generate Wishbone stimulus for register writes/reads and BD writes.
Stimulate SD card interface using a virtual SD card model (command and data streams).
Verify interrupt generation logic by asserting status bits.
Coverage: register write/read, BD write/read, command sequence, data transfer, CRC errors.
synthesis: Run synthesis on a target FPGA (e.g., Xilinx Artix‑7) with 200 MHz clock.
Check area, timing, and power reports.
Verify that all reused IPs are mapped to vendor IP cores.
formal: Use property checking for Wishbone handshake (ack_o only after stb_i & cyc_i).
Assert that BD free counter never underflows.
Assert that CRC outputs match expected values for known patterns.
static_analysis: Lint SystemVerilog with Synopsys VCS or Questa.
Check for uninitialized variables, race conditions, and metastability.

assertions: Wishbone handshake: assert wb_ack_o only when wb_cyc_i & wb_stb_i.
CRC: crc_out matches expected for test vectors.
Interrupt: int_a asserted only when normal_int_status_reg & normal_int_signal_enable_reg.
Clock domain crossing: no metastability detected on req/ack signals.

unresolved_assumptions: The SD card interface timing (setup/hold) is compatible with the chosen sd_clk frequency.
The SD_BUS_W is fixed to 4 bits; no support for 1‑bit mode is implemented.
The Wishbone master burst type (CTI/BTE) is always 0 (single transfer).
The asynchronous reset of sd_clock_divider is active‑high and does not require a synchronous de‑assertion.
The BD_SIZE is a power of two (<= 256) to simplify pointer wrap‑around logic.
The external SD card model used in simulation correctly implements the SD protocol timing and CRC checks.
